title: Bitou councillor  allegedly involved in drink-driving incident
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A 40-year-old man believed to be a Bitou town councillor was arrested on a drink-driving charge along the N2 in Plettenberg Bay on Friday 5 September.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A 40-year-old man believed to be a Bitou town councillor was arrested on a drink-driving charge along the N2 in Plettenberg Bay on Friday 5 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The suspect is yet to make his first court appearance and his identity can therefore not be confirmed by the police, said SAPS Southern Cape media spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies confirmed that the man was arrested at Qolweni at about 21:20 on Friday.","html":"Spies confirmed that the man was arrested at Qolweni at about 21:20 on Friday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspect was released later and that the outcome of forensic results are being awaited.","html":"The suspect was released later and that the outcome of forensic results are being awaited."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“He will appear in court once charged,” said Spies.","html":"“He will appear in court once charged,” said Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Bitou councillor  allegedly involved in drink-driving incident
